objective: Objectif de stratégie crypto : "Utiliser les familles robustes de signaux (breakout, momentum et mean reversion) pour optimiser un mélange unique d'indicateurs (EMA+OBV, BOLLINGER + STOCHASTIC, EMA) sur le marché 0GUSDC en 1h. Gestion des risques non linéaires basées sur les variations de liquidité et un filtre horaire adaptatif seront utilisés pour minimiser les faux signaux. Explorer des comportements aléatoires pour éviter la répétition de formations courantes, en alternant entre profils risque serre/large selon la volatilité.

pre_reflection.text:
[Pre-reflection] This strategy is based on robust families of signals, risk management with non-linear variations of liquidity and an adaptive hourly filter. It also explores random behavior to avoid repeating common patterns by alternating between high-risk/low volatility profiles. However, the current iteration has shown a negative return (Sharpe=-1.492) after 3 trades, which indicates potential weaknesses in the strategy.
[Backup plan] If results are poor (negative return), we would consider adjusting our risk management filters to improve signal accuracy and reduce false signals. Additionally, we could explore different combinations of indicators or adjust our entry/exit criteria. If results are mediocre (low Sharpe), we may try increasing the number of trades per strategy, modifying the market conditions considered for analysis, or trying different strategies altogether.
